_readme: Season One posting calendar. Drives publish_youtube.py / publish_instagram.py.
'day' is relative to LAUNCH_DATE (set when Charlie picks it); post times are
17:00 local unless 'time' overrides. 'platforms': ig | yt | tiktok (tiktok
stays manual/1-tap: files + captions here are the prep pack).
Paths are repo-relative. Items with status 'blocked' name their gate.

posts.caption: the whole island is here. episode one drops tomorrow. 🌋

posts.title: TINY DINOS — Ep. 1: The Last Good Day
posts.caption: he has one rule. nobody touches the leaf. 🍃 (ep. 1) #indiegame #couchgames #dinosaur #animation #gamedev #cartoon #tinydinos #Shorts
posts.cover_hint: the leap over Max — it IS the first frame (0.4s)
posts.pinned_comment: ep. 2 drops when this hits 100 likes 👀
posts.status: BLOCKED — needs the flooded-island reveal as VIDEO (54cr); balance 12.5
posts.note: EP1 REVISION (35.8s). Fixes from Charlie: subtitles REMOVED (the v8 decision had been dropped by mistake), and the fight now RESOLVES — tide.mp4 0.8-5.4s (Ralph over Max, sword lowering, they separate) was ignored in the first build, which is why it jumped from mid-charge to two calm dinos in water and left the viewer confused. NO STILLS IN REELS (Charlie's rule) — stills are production aids only, so the flooded-island reveal is currently ABSENT and the episode ends weakly on a wave at their feet. TO FINISH: generate a video with tide_c.png (or a style-matched restyle of it) as the START FRAME so the model only has to CONTINUE an already-flooded scene — the ask it failed when told to flood a dry beach. 54cr.
